v2_sources.title: Modified titration of donanemab reduces ARIA risk and maintains amyloid reduction
v2_sources.citation: Modified titration of donanemab reduces ARIA risk and maintains amyloid reduction. Alzheimer's & Dementia. 2025.

boundary_tags.population_or_model: Early symptomatic Alzheimer's disease patients receiving donanemab treatment

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'ARIA-E frequencies at 24 weeks: standard arm 23.7%, modified titration 13.7%, dose skipping 18.6%, Cmax arm 18.3%', 'page': 1}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'ARIA-E frequencies at 24 weeks: standard arm 23.7%, modified titration 13.7%, dose skipping 18.6%, Cmax arm 18.3%', 'page': 1}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'ARIA-E frequencies at 52 weeks were similar to week 24: standard arm 24.2%, modified titration 15.6%, dose skipping 18.6%, Cmax arm 18.8%', 'page': 1}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'ARIA-E frequencies at 52 weeks were similar to week 24: standard arm 24.2%, modified titration 15.6%, dose skipping 18.6%, Cmax arm 18.8%', 'page': 1}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Modified titration met the primary endpoint with posterior RRR of 40.5% (SD 0.123), 95% CrI: 0.135-0.616, posterior probability of RRR ≥20% was 94.1%', 'page': 6}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Modified titration met the primary endpoint with posterior RRR of 40.5% (SD 0.123), 95% CrI: 0.135-0.616, posterior probability of RRR ≥20% was 94.1%', 'page': 6}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Modified titration versus standard arm at week 24 had comparable non-ARIA-E related safety profile, amyloid reduction, plasma phosphorylated tau217 reduction, cumulative exposure, and pha
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Modified titration versus standard arm at week 24 had comparable non-ARIA-E related safety profile, amyloid reduction, plasma phosphorylated tau217 reduction, cumulative exposure, and pha

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Amyloid reduction from baseline to 24 weeks: adjusted mean change of 58.8 CL (SE 1.8) in standard arm and 56.3 CL (SE 1.7) in modified titration arm', 'page': 7}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Amyloid reduction from baseline to 24 weeks: adjusted mean change of 58.8 CL (SE 1.8) in standard arm and 56.3 CL (SE 1.7) in modified titration arm', 'page': 7}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Approximately 56.7% and 50.7% of participants in standard and modified titration arms respectively achieved amyloid negativity (<24 CL) at 24 weeks', 'page': 7}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Approximately 56.7% and 50.7% of participants in standard and modified titration arms respectively achieved amyloid negativity (<24 CL) at 24 weeks', 'page': 7}
